description_long: This house features a classic gable roof with dark shingles and white siding, set on a rectangular green lawn. The front facade includes a covered porch supported by columns, wooden steps, and a main entry door flanked by large windows. The side elevations display symmetrical window arrangements with brown shutters, while the rear and opposite side have additional windows for natural light. The porch area is illuminated, suggesting a welcoming entryway. The overall design is reminiscent of American suburban homes, with a blend of traditional and craftsman elements. The structure appears to be a single-family residence with one and a half stories, offering a cozy and inviting appearance.
description: A white, gable-roofed house with a covered front porch, symmetrical windows, and brown shutters, set on a green lawn. The design is traditional and inviting, with classic suburban architectural features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entry door, steps, and large windows with brown shutters.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting three large windows and a partial view of the porch and entryway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a row of windows with brown shutters and the extended gable roof.
description_view_3: Right side view with two windows and a clear view of the roof's shape and rear wall.
attribute_architectural_style: Craftsman with traditional American suburban influences
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with wooden steps, columns, and a central entry door flanked by large windows
